INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT

(CAPITAL REQUIREMENTS DIRECTIVE)

[ L.S. 370.46.

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.46
REGOLAMENTI DWAR INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT
(SUPERVISORY CONSOLIDATION) (CAPITAL
REQUIREMENTS DIRECTIVE)
1 ta’ Frar, 2022
AVVIŻ LEGALI 495 tal-2021, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 29 tal2022, 73 tal-2023, 45 u 154 tal-2025.

Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
